## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case or problem you are trying to solve.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## API sketch (optional)

```tsx
// If you have a rough idea of the API, sketch it here
```

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Component layer

For new components — which layers should be included?

- [ ] Layer 1 — Hook (pure logic, no JSX)
- [ ] Layer 2 — Headless (unstyled, render props)
- [ ] Layer 3 — Styled (drop-in default)

## Additional context

Anything else — links, mockups, prior art.
